content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.8 WARN — LoginView.swift uses GIDSignIn (Google Sign-In) as the sole account creation/authentication method with no ASAuthorizationAppleID / Sign in with Apple button offered (App/LoginView.swift:1-16), and description.txt markets "One-tap Google sign-in" with no alternative.

Pierre: Apple requires an equivalent privacy-preserving login option (like Sign in with Apple) whenever a third-party social login such as Google is used to set up the primary account, unless an exemption applies. Here Google Sign-In is the only auth method shown in code and in the App Store description, with no exempt pattern (not enterprise-only, not a client for a specific third-party service). Add a Sign in with Apple button alongside GoogleSignInButton, or document/verify why an exemption applies.
